title: 4DPocket Audit Fixes - Security & Quality Hardening
description: Fix all 49 remaining issues from the 2026-04-03 code audit (6 Critical, 9 High, 13 Medium, 21 Low/Info). Public deployment readiness.

stories.title: Account lockout on failed login (S-05, CRITICAL)
acceptanceCriteria: src/fourdpocket/api/auth.py: login endpoint tracks failed_attempts and locked_until per account
Account locked after 5 consecutive failed attempts with exponential backoff (5, 10, 20, 40, 80 min)
Locked account returns HTTP 429 with 'Too many failed attempts' message
Failed attempts reset on successful login
Tests verify: login works after failed attempts reset, login blocked during lockout

stories.title: Admin role guard on frontend (F-01, CRITICAL)
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: checks currentUser?.role === 'admin', redirects to '/' otherwise
frontend/src/App.tsx: admin route wrapped in role check
Non-admin users see 403 or redirect, never admin UI controls

stories.title: Media downloader SSRF + file size cap (W-03, CRITICAL)
acceptanceCriteria: src/fourdpocket/workers/media_downloader.py: validates URL with _is_safe_media_url() before fetching
Max file size enforced: 100MB — downloads exceeding limit raise ValueError
URL scheme restricted to http/https only
Timeout enforced on httpx.get()

stories.title: Screenshot worker SSRF + size cap (W-04, CRITICAL)
acceptanceCriteria: src/fourdpocket/workers/screenshot.py: validates URL with _is_safe_screenshot_url() before navigating
Max screenshot bytes enforced (10MB)
URL scheme restricted to http/https only
Timeouts enforced on Playwright navigation

stories.title: ShareDialog schema mismatch fix (F-03, CRITICAL)
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/src/components/sharing/ShareDialog.tsx: removes recipient_email/recipient_role from share creation payload
User gets clear feedback when share creation fails

stories.title: Pagination on unpaginated list endpoints (B-01, CRITICAL - DoS risk)
acceptanceCriteria: src/fourdpocket/api/collections.py: list_collections() has offset/limit query params (ge=0, le=100)
src/fourdpocket/api/tags.py: list_tags() has offset/limit query params
src/fourdpocket/api/rules.py: list_rules() has offset/limit query params
src/fourdpocket/api/collections.py: list_collection_items() has offset/limit query params
src/fourdpocket/api/items.py: get_timeline() has offset/limit query params
src/fourdpocket/api/collections.py: get_smart_collection_items() has offset/limit query params (remove hardcoded limit=50)

stories.title: Password complexity requirements (S-07, HIGH)
acceptanceCriteria: src/fourdpocket/models/user.py: UserCreate password validator checks: uppercase, digit, special char
Registration fails with descriptive error if password doesn't meet complexity
Tests verify: 'password123' rejected, 'Pass123!' accepted

stories.title: Email validation with EmailStr (S-08, HIGH)
acceptanceCriteria: src/fourdpocket/models/user.py: email field changed from str to EmailStr
Registration fails with 422 for invalid email formats
email-validator package added to dependencies

stories.title: JWT token: localStorage to httpOnly cookie (F-02, HIGH)
acceptanceCriteria: Backend: /auth/login sets httpOnly, sameSite=strict, secure cookie '4dp_token'
Backend: /auth/me reads token from cookie (Cookie header) via deps.py
Backend: /auth/logout clears cookie
Frontend: api/client.ts reads token from cookie via browser auto-send, not localStorage
Frontend: localStorage now stores only a 'logged in' flag for UI state
XSS cannot exfiltrate token from httpOnly cookie

stories.title: Error message leak fix (B-03, HIGH)
acceptanceCriteria: src/fourdpocket/api/deps.py: token decode exception uses generic message, not str(e)
Tests verify: invalid token returns 'Invalid authentication token', not JWT error detail

stories.title: Huey task DoS amplification mitigation (W-06, HIGH)
acceptanceCriteria: Workers: retry count reduced (fetcher: 3->2, media_downloader: 2->1 with 60s delay)
Fetch retries use longer backoff (10s -> 30s)

stories.title: AI enrichment content sanitization (W-07, MEDIUM)
acceptanceCriteria: src/fourdpocket/workers/ai_enrichment.py: title, content, description sanitized via ai/sanitizer.py before LLM call
src/fourdpocket/ai/sanitizer.py: coverage improved — added base64 detection, more injection patterns
Tests verify: known injection patterns stripped from content before LLM call

stories.title: Persistent rate limiter for production (S-10/S-11, MEDIUM)
stories.notes: Skipped - requires database migration for production use. In-memory rate limiter documented as ephemeral.

stories.title: Type consistency fixes (B-04/B-05, MEDIUM)
acceptanceCriteria: src/fourdpocket/api/tags.py: TagMergeRequest has Pydantic schema with UUID fields, no raw dict access
src/fourdpocket/api/items.py: reading_progress uses UUID not str for item_id

stories.title: Frontend quality fixes (F-05 through F-13, MEDIUM)
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/src/hooks/use-keyboard.ts: '/' shortcut excluded when focus is in search/select/input elements
frontend/src/pages/Register.tsx: 409 detection uses err.message.includes('409'), not string includes
frontend/src/hooks/use-auth.ts: retry strategy handles transient network errors gracefully
frontend/src/stores/ui-store.ts: JSON.parse wrapped in try/catch with fallback to 'system'
frontend/src/components/sharing/ShareDialog.tsx: onSuccess uses data.public_token from response

stories.title: JWT missing iss/iat claims (S-15, LOW)
acceptanceCriteria: src/fourdpocket/api/auth_utils.py: JWT tokens include 'iss' (issuer=4dpocket) and 'iat' (issued-at) claims

stories.title: Frontend quality (low priority: F-10 through F-17, B-07)
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/src/stores/ui-store.ts: JSON.parse wrapped in try/catch (done in AF-015)
src/fourdpocket/storage/local.py: path traversal raises PermissionError instead of ValueError
src/fourdpocket/sharing/feed_manager.py: feed items include private shares user has access to
